name: claude-statusline
description: Zero-dependency statusline for Claude Code with rainbow progress bar, 10 themes, rate limit monitoring, and natural language configuration.

hooks.command: if command -v node >/dev/null 2>&1; then node ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/auto-update-path.js; elif command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1; then bun ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/auto-update-path.js; fi
